issues.issue: Create schema 'TaxDeclarationCreate' contains 'uuid:' which should not be in input schemas
Potential SQL injection vulnerability in sort_by parameter
issues.fix: Validate sort_by against a whitelist of allowed columns before passing to getattr()

issues.issue: Missing transaction atomicity for bulk item insertion
issues.fix: Wrap the loop in a try-except block or use a bulk_save_objects approach to ensure all items are committed together
The agent noted advanced listing support, but the implementation only supports basic equality filters; add range filters for amounts or dates

improvement_hints_for_agent: Always sanitize dynamic attribute access (like sort_by) against a whitelist to prevent SQL injection.
Ensure that bulk operations are wrapped in explicit transaction handling to maintain data integrity.
When claiming 'advanced listing', implement at least one range-based filter (e.g., min/max amount) to justify the claim.
passed_checks: Correct usage of UUID path parameters
